name: YALCO - Socrates D. Constantinou & Son S.A.
summary: YALCO - Socrates D. Constantinou & Son S.A. distributes and supplies household and hotel equipment in Greece. It offers porcelain products that include glassware, cutlery, kitchen utensils, and table accessories under IONIA name; and operates retail outlets, as well as manufactures nonstick aluminum cookware products under Fest name. The company also provides professional equipment for tabletop, buffet, kitchen, lobby, room service, and conference. It serves customers through department stores, hypermarkets, supermarkets, and independent retailers. The company also exports its products to 35 countries. YALCO - Socrates D. Constantinou & Son S.A. was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Kifissia, Greece.
